trim.if: AND not EXISTS(select x.id from lkt_comments x where x.store_id=a.store_id and x.oid=a.sno)

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_order a

select sum(a.z_price) as total,b.name,b.id mchId from lkt_order as a left join lkt_customer as b on a.store_id = b.id
mchId,
total ${total_sort},
limit #{startPage},#{pageEnd}
select count(distinct a.store_id) from lkt_order as a left join lkt_customer as b on a.store_id = b.id

select a.store_id,count(a.id) as total,b.name from lkt_order as a left join lkt_customer as b on a.store_id = b.id
a.store_id,
total ${total_sort},
limit #{startPage},#{pageEnd}
select count(distinct a.store_id) from lkt_order as a left join lkt_customer as b on a.store_id = b.id
mapper.sql: a . `id` , a.`store_id`, a.`user_id`, a.`name`, a.`mobile`, a.`num`, a.`old_total`, a.`z_price`, a.`sNo`, a.`sheng`, a.`shi`, a.`xian`, a.`address`, a.`remark`, a.`pay`, a.`add_time`, a.`pay_time`, a.`arrive_time`, a.`order_failure_time`, a.`status`, a.`coupon_id`, a.`subtraction_id`, a.`consumer_money`, a.`coupon_activity_name`, a.`drawid`, a.`otype`, a.`ptcode`, a.`pid`, a.`ptstatus`, a.`groupman`, a.`refundsNo`, a.`trade_no`, a.`is_anonymous`, a.`logistics_service`, a.`overall_evaluation`, a.`spz_price`, a.`reduce_price`, a.`coupon_price`, a.`red_packet`, a.`allow`, a.`parameter`, a.`source`, a.`delivery_status`, a.`readd`, a.`remind`, a.`offset_balance`, a.`mch_id`, a.`zhekou`, a.`grade_rate`, a.`vip_source`, a.`score_deduction`, a.`grade_score`, a.`grade_fan`, a.`p_sNo`, a.`bargain_id`, a.`comm_discount`, a.`real_sno`, a.`orderId`, a.`baiduId`, a.`remarks`, a.`self_lifting`, a.`extraction_code`, a.`extraction_code_img`, a.`VerifiedBy_type`, a.`VerifiedBy`, a.`is_put`, a.`old_freight`, a.`z_freight`, a.`manual_offer`, a.`preferential_amount`, a.`recycle`, a.`single_store`, a.`pick_up_store`, a.`store_write_time`, a.`platform_activities_id`, a.`commission_type`, a.`settlement_status`, a.`operation_type`, a.`is_lssued`, a.`user_recycle`, a.`mch_recycle`, a.`store_recycle`, a.`transaction_id`, a.`wx_order_status`, a.`dividend_status`, a.`cancel_method`, a.`paypal_id`, a.`currency_symbol`, a.`exchange_rate`, a.`currency_code`, a.`stripe_id`
mapper.select:
SELECT
, a.dId, a.write_off_num, a.platform_coupon_price, a.store_self_delivery, a.store_coupon_price, a.p_price, a.mchId, a.after_write_off_num, a.mch_store_write_id, a.write_time, a.p_id, a.supplier_superior, a.p_mch_id, a.write_off_settings, a.is_appointment, a.write_off_mch_ids, a.anchor_name, a.live_img, a.currency_symbol, a.exchange_rate, a.currency_code, a.Dafter_discount FROM ( SELECT a.*, row_number () over ( PARTITION BY a.sNo ) AS top, d.id AS dId, d.write_off_num, d.platform_coupon_price, d.store_self_delivery, d.store_coupon_price, d.p_price, d.mch_id AS mchId, d.after_write_off_num, d.mch_store_write_id, d.write_time, p.id AS p_id, p.supplier_superior, p.mch_id AS p_mch_id, p.write_off_settings AS write_off_settings, p.is_appointment, p.write_off_mch_ids, u.user_name AS anchor_name, u.headimgurl AS live_img, d.after_discount AS Dafter_discount FROM lkt_order a RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON p.id = d.p_id LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON u.user_id = d.anchor_id LEFT JOIN lkt_living_room r ON r.id = d.living_room_id
order by add_time desc ) as a
and a.top <2
limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}
select count( distinct a.sNo) from lkt_order a RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list as p on p.id = d.p_id
mapper.update:
update lkt_order
status=#{status},
recycle = #{recycle},
name = #{name},
mobile = #{mobile},
address = #{address},
sheng = #{sheng},
shi = #{shi},
xian = #{xian},
remarks = #{remarks},
recycle = #{recycle},
readd = #{readd},
VerifiedBy_type = #{VerifiedBy_type},
VerifiedBy = #{VerifiedBy},
arrive_time = #{arrive_time},
cancel_method = #{cancel_method},
and store_id = #{storeId}
and sNo = #{orderno}
and user_id = #{user_id}
and status = #{statusType}
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
#{sNo}

sql.if: and (a.sNo like '%${keyWord}%' or d.p_name like '%${keyWord}%' or a.real_sno like '%${keyWord}%' )

choose.when: and a.status = 5 and not EXISTS (select x.id from lkt_comments x where x.oid = a.sno and d.id=x.order_detail_id )

mapper.select:
SELECT a.allow, a.id, a.real_sno, a.num, a.vip_source, a.currency_code, a.currency_symbol, a.exchange_rate, a.z_price, a.sNo, a.add_time, a.status, a.delivery_status, a.otype, a.mch_id, a.sid, a.offset_balance, a.pay_time, a.pay_type, a.is_distribution, a.self_lifting, a.store_id, a.spz_price, a.single_store, a.settlement_status, a.arrive_time, a.z_freight, a.imgurl, a.old_total, a.old_freight, a.recycle, a.user_id, a.p_name, a.product_title, a.did, a.is_lssued, a.user_recycle, a.gongyingshang, a.wx_order_status, a.write_off_settings, a.goodsNum, a.voucher, a.review_status, a.reason_for_rejection FROM ( SELECT a.allow, a.voucher, a.id, a.real_sno, a.num, a.vip_source, a.currency_code, a.currency_symbol, a.exchange_rate, a.z_price, a.sNo, row_number () over ( PARTITION BY a.sNo ) AS top, a.add_time, a.STATUS, a.delivery_status, a.otype, a.mch_id, d.sid, a.offset_balance, a.pay_time, a.pay AS pay_type, p.is_distribution, a.self_lifting, a.store_id, a.spz_price, a.single_store, a.settlement_status, a.arrive_time, a.z_freight, p.imgurl, a.old_total, a.old_freight, a.recycle, a.user_id, d.p_name, p.product_title, d.id as did, a.is_lssued, a.user_recycle, p.gongyingshang, a.wx_order_status, p.write_off_settings, d.num AS goodsNum, a.review_status, a.reason_for_rejection FROM lkt_order a RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON p.id = d.p_id
a.store_id = #{storeId} and a.recycle = 0
order by add_time desc ) AS a WHERE a.top < 2
limit #{start},#{pageSize} LIMIT #{start},10

SELECT count(distinct a.sNo) FROM lkt_order a RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON a.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list as p on p.id = d.p_id
a.store_id = #{storeId} and a.recycle = 0

select COUNT(distinct o.id) as num from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id right join lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo right join lkt_product_list as p on p.id = d.p_id right join lkt_mch as m on p.mch_id = m.id

sql.if:
and o.sNo in (
select sNo from lkt_return_order ro where id in ( select max(id) from lkt_return_order where store_id = #{store_id} and re_type > 0 group by sNo ) and ro.re_type = #{reType}
and ro.r_type in (1, 3) and ro.re_type = 1
and ro.r_type in (4, 9, 13, 15)
and ro.r_type in (2, 5, 8) and ro.re_type != 3
and ro.r_type in (1, 3, 11) and ro.re_type = 3
and ro.r_type = 12
and ro.r_type in (5, 10) and ro.re_type = 3
and ro.r_type = 0
)
and (m.name like concat('%',#{mchSupplierName},'%') or s.supplier_name like concat('%',#{mchSupplierName},'%'))

and (o.sNo like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or lu.user_name like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or o.mobile like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or o.user_id like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or o.p_sno like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or o.name like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/' or o.real_sno like concat('%',#{sNo},'%') escape '/')
and exists(select x.id from lkt_group_open x inner join lkt_group_open_record y on x.id=y.open_id where y.sno=o.sno and x.status=#{groupStatus} )

choose.when:
and o.otype = 'pt'
and o.status= 0 and o.status= 9 and o.status > 0 and o.status < 9 and o.status > 9

sql.if: and p.gongyingshang is not null and p.gongyingshang != ''
AND o.sNo not in (SELECT x.r_sNo FROM lkt_order_details x RIGHT JOIN lkt_product_list xx ON x.p_id = xx.id AND xx.supplier_superior IS NOT NULL WHERE x.r_status = 0)
and o.pay != '' and o.pay is not null
and (o.status = 2 or (o.status = 5 and o.VerifiedBy_type = 2 and o.VerifiedBy = #{mchAdminId2}))

mapper.select:
SELECT a.detailId, a.p_id, a.sid, a.real_sno, a.id, a.consumer_money, a.num, a.sNo, a.name, a.sheng, a.shi, a.xian, a.source, a.address, a.add_time, a.mobile, a.old_total, a.old_freight, a.z_price, a.z_freight, a.goodsNum, a.pay_time, a.status, a.reduce_price, a.coupon_price, a.preferential_amount, a.allow, a.otype, a.ptstatus, a.spz_price, a.drawid, a.user_name, a.user_id, a.mch_id, a.num , a.p_sNo, a.shop_id, a.shopName, a.arrive_time, a.settlement_status, a.operation_type, a.product_title, a.attribute, a.img, a.needNum, a.self_lifting, a.is_lssued, a.express_id, a.courier_num, a.freight, a.goodsAmt, a.after_discount, a.store_self_delivery, a.pay, a.supplierName, a.supplier_settlement, a.gongyingshang, a.supplier_superior, a.write_off_settings, a.is_appointment, a.commodity_type, a. goodsPrice, a.r_status, a.liveCommission, a.mchId, a.currency_symbol, a.exchange_rate, a.currency_code, a.p_integral, a.review_status, a.review_time, a.reason_for_rejection, a.voucher, a.cpc, a.shop_cpc FROM ( SELECT d.id detailId, d.p_integral, d.p_id, d.sid, o.real_sno, o.id, o.consumer_money, o.num, o.sNo, o.name, o.sheng, o.shi, o.xian, o.source, o.address, o.add_time, o.mobile, o.old_total, o.old_freight, o.z_price, o.z_freight, count( d.id ) over(partition by o.sNo) goodsNum, o.pay_time, o.STATUS, o.reduce_price, o.coupon_price, o.preferential_amount, o.allow, o.otype, o.ptstatus, o.spz_price, o.drawid, lu.user_name, o.user_id, o.mch_id, sum(case when d.mch_id = #{mch_pro} then 1 else 0 end) over(partition by o.sNo) as d_num ,
o.p_sNo, m.id AS shop_id, m.name shopName, o.arrive_time, o.settlement_status, o.operation_type, d.p_name product_title, attr.attribute, attr.img, d.num needNum, o.self_lifting, o.is_lssued, d.express_id, d.courier_num, d.freight, attr.price goodsAmt, d.after_discount, d.store_self_delivery, o.pay, s.supplier_name supplierName, sum( d.supplier_settlement ) over(partition by o.sNo) supplier_settlement, p.gongyingshang, p.supplier_superior, p.write_off_settings, p.is_appointment, p.commodity_type, d.p_price goodsPrice, d.r_status, d.commission AS liveCommission, d.mch_id AS mchId, o.currency_symbol, o.exchange_rate, o.currency_code, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by o.sNo) AS top, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by d.id) AS top2, o.review_status, o.review_time, o.reason_for_rejection, o.voucher, o.cpc, o.shop_cpc FROM lkt_order AS o LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS lu ON o.user_id = lu.user_id RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details AS d ON o.sNo = d.r_sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure attr ON attr.id = d.sid RIGHT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON p.id = attr.pid RIGHT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON p.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_payment pay ON pay.class_name = o.pay LEFT JOIN lkt_supplier AS s ON p.gongyingshang = s.id
FIELD(o.`status`, 1, 0, 2,5,7) ${diy_status_sort},
FIELD(o.`status`, ${order_status_sort}) ASC ,
o.add_time ${add_time_sort},
) AS a
and a.top <2 and a.top2 <2
a.add_time ${add_time_sort},
limit #{start},#{pagesize}

select count(distinct o.sNo) from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id right join lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure attr on attr.id=d.sid right join lkt_product_list as p on p.id = attr.pid right join lkt_mch as m on p.mch_id = m.id left join lkt_supplier as s on p.gongyingshang = s.id

select IFNULL(SUM(z_price), 0) from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id right join lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure attr on attr.id=d.sid right join lkt_product_list as p on p.id = attr.pid right join lkt_mch as m on p.mch_id = m.id

select lpl.imgurl,lpl.product_title,lpl.product_number,lod.p_price,lod.unit,lod.num,lod.size, lod.p_id,lod.courier_num,lod.express_id,lod.freight,lpl.brand_id ,lm.name as mchname,lod.r_status from lkt_order_details as lod left join lkt_product_list as lpl on lpl.id=lod.p_id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch as lm on lm.id = lpl.mch_id where r_sNo= #{sNo}
and lpl.brand_id = #{brand}

select o.p_sNo, o.otype, o.mch_id, d.id, d.r_sNo, d.user_id, d.p_id, d.p_name, d.p_price, d.num, d.r_status, d.sid, d.size, p.imgurl, o.otype, o.currency_symbol, o.exchange_rate, o.currency_code, o.self_lifting, d.supplier_settlement, d.deliver_num, b.brand_name from lkt_order_details as d left join lkt_configure as attr on attr.id = d.sid left join lkt_product_list as p on p.id = attr.pid left join lkt_order as o on d.r_sNo = o.sNo left join lkt_brand_class as b on p.brand_id = b.brand_id where d.store_id = #{storeId} and d.r_sNo = #{orderNo} and d.r_status = 1 and d.deliver_num < d.num and not EXISTS( select x.id from lkt_return_order x where x.p_id = d.id and x.r_type not in (2, 4, 5, 8, 9, 10, 12))

select o.id, o.user_id, o.sNo, d.p_name, d.p_id, d.sid, d.num, o.name, o.currency_symbol, o.exchange_rate, o.currency_code, o.address from lkt_order as o left join lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo where o.store_id = #{storeId} and d.id in (#{orderDetailsId})
SELECT count(1) from lkt_order as o LEFT JOIN lkt_user as u on o.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_configure as c on d.sid = c.id
select count(1) from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id
select SUM(o.z_price) z_price,COUNT(o.id) num from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id

select count(1) from lkt_order a RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details c on c.r_sNo = a.sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_product_list b on c.p_id=b.id
DATE_FORMAT(a.add_time,'%Y-%m-%d') >= #{startDate} and DATE_FORMAT(a.add_time,'%Y-%m-%d') <= #{endDate} and a.store_id=#{storeid} and a.recycle=0 and a.otype='GM'
and not exists (select * from lkt_comments c where a.id=c.oid) and a.status= 5
and a.status=#{status}
AND a.store_recycle = 1 AND ( b.gongyingshang IS NULL OR b.gongyingshang = '' )

SELECT ifnull( sum( a.z_price ), 0 ) FROM lkt_order a WHERE a.store_id = #{storeid}
AND DATE_FORMAT( a.pay_time, "%Y-%m-%d" )= #{date}
select ifnull(sum(a.z_price),0 ) from lkt_order a where store_id=#{storeid} AND DATE_FORMAT(pay_time,"%Y-%m")=#{date}

select (ifnull(sum(a.z_price),0 ) - (select ifnull(sum(real_money),0) from lkt_return_order where r_type in(4,9) and store_id=#{storeid} and sNo IN(SELECT sNo FROM lkt_order where store_id = #{storeid}))) total from lkt_order a where store_id=#{storeid}

SELECT sum( z_price ) amount, user_id name, user_id FROM lkt_order a WHERE a.store_id=#{storeid} and a.add_time>= #{date} AND status = 5 and recycle = 0 GROUP BY a.user_id ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 0,10
SELECT sum( z_price ) amount, user_id name, user_id FROM lkt_order a WHERE a.store_id=#{storeid} AND status = 5 and recycle = 0 GROUP BY a.user_id ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 0,10

select a.id, a.store_id, a.user_id, a.NAME, a.mobile, a.num, a.old_total, a.z_price, a.sNo, a.sheng, a.shi, a.xian, a.address, a.remark, a.pay, a.add_time, a.pay_time, a.status, a.coupon_id, a.subtraction_id, a.consumer_money, a.coupon_activity_name, a.drawid, a.otype, a.ptcode, a.refundsNo, a.trade_no, a.is_anonymous, a.spz_price, a.reduce_price, a.coupon_price, a.red_packet, a.allow, a.source, a.delivery_status, a.readd, a.remind, a.offset_balance, a.mch_id, a.zhekou, a.grade_rate, a.grade_fan, a.p_sNo, a.bargain_id, a.comm_discount, a.real_sno, a.remarks, a.self_lifting, a.extraction_code, a.extraction_code_img, a.is_put, a.z_freight, a.manual_offer, a.preferential_amount, a.recycle, a.single_store, a.pick_up_store, a.currency_symbol, a.currency_code, a.exchange_rate, a.commission_type, a.settlement_status, a.operation_type from lkt_order as a
a.add_time ${add_time_sort},
limit #{page},10
select count(1) from lkt_order a

SELECT a.*,c.write_off_mch_ids,b.mch_store_write_id FROM lkt_order a LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details b on a.sNo=b.r_sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list c on b.p_id=c.id
a.self_lifting =3 AND a.recycle IN ( 0, 2 ) and a.store_id = #{store_id} AND a.otype = 'VI' and a.mch_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mchId},'%') and a.sNo like concat('%',#{key},'%')
and a.status IN (8)
and a.status = 5 and a.VerifiedBy_type = 2
and (c.write_off_mch_ids = '0' or c.write_off_mch_ids like concat('%',#{write_off_mch_ids},'%') ) and (b.mch_store_write_id IS null or b.mch_store_write_id = #{write_off_mch_ids})
order by a.add_time desc ,id
LIMIT #{page},#{pageSize}

SELECT o.* FROM lkt_order o LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON o.sNo = d.r_sNo WHERE d.write_time IS NOT NULL AND o.pay_time IS NULL and o.mch_id like concat('%',#{mchId},'%') and o.store_id = #{storeId} and o.status = 0 and o.otype='VI'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%m-%d') AS time, COUNT(1) AS value FROM `lkt_order` WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND recycle = 0
mch_id = CONCAT(',',#{mchId},',')
AND STATUS IN (1, 2, 5, 7) AND z_price > 0 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL -- 修正：直接用日期函数比较，避免重复格式化 AND add_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND add_time <= DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), -- 按完整日期分组（与筛选条件对应） DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%m-%d') -- 确保 SELECT 中的非聚合列在 GROUP BY 中 ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%Y-%m-%d') -- 按日期排序，保证结果顺序

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%m/%d') AS time, IFNULL(SUM(z_price), 0) AS value FROM ( SELECT add_time, z_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY DATE_FORMAT(add_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY add_time ASC -- 按任意顺序，确保每组一条记录 ) AS rn FROM `lkt_order` WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND recycle = 0
mch_id = CONCAT(',',#{mchId},',')
AND add_time >= #{startDate} AND add_time < #{endDate} AND STATUS IN(1, 2,5,7) AND pay_time is not null ) AS t WHERE t.rn = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.add_time, '%Y-%m-%d'); -- 按完整日期分组

SELECT id, self_lifting FROM lkt_order WHERE id IN
#{id}
